rationale.R1.4: The agent correctly identified prior works and narrowed the novelty claims, mapping against several nearest works.
rationale.R1.7: Flagged missing citations but didn't audit with full precision, requiring verification.
rationale.RX.1: Highlighted uncertainties regarding judge model and cost baseline, marking confidence for recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Avoided introducing errors and identified harmful patterns in original content.
